frames.caption: A white circle is positioned at the left edge of a solid red background, with "t=0.0s" displayed in white text in the upper left corner.
A white circle is positioned in the left-center area of a solid green background at the 1.0 second timestamp.
A white circle is centered on a blue background with "t=2.0s" displayed in the upper left corner.
A white circle is positioned on the right side of a turquoise background with "t=3.0s" displayed in the upper left corner.
